title: Bikers RPG mod!
description: Upgrade your abilities with this new RPG mod, gather experience and exchange them for coins to upgrade your swim speed, health, reach and speed!
body:
Upgrade your abilities with this new RPG mod, gather experience and exchange them for coins to upgrade your swim speed, health, reach and speed!

Open the menu by pressing R and exchange 10 XP levels for 1 point. to max out an upgrade it takes 10 points.

Configure the key to open it in settings under the miscellaneous tab.

If you have any suggestions or bugs, comment them down below. This mod is for forge 1.20.1.
